title: The Fractured Dreamline
summary: After defeating the Name‑Echo, Somnia sends the player to investigate a rupture in the Dreamline. The Dreamline Rift is a chaotic space where memories, emotions, and corrupted resonance collide. The player must navigate shifting dream geometry, protect their Cyberkin from memory distortion, and confront the Memory‑Thief Echo—an entity that steals and rewrites memories. Defeating it stabilizes the Dreamline temporarily and reveals a memory fragment showing the player’s past self interacting with Somnia.
